args.message: Step right up! Feast your eyes on this magnificent 2015 BMW 328i Sport. This beauty is loaded with the desirable turbocharged 2.0L engine and the sporty Sport Line package, featuring sharp sport seats and a leather M steering wheel. It runs and drives like a dream, and I've got the service records to prove it's been meticulously cared for. This one won't last long!

text: Oh, it sounds lovely! I'm glad to hear it's been well-maintained. Could you tell me a little more about those service records you mentioned?

args.message: Absolutely! We pride ourselves on transparency here. The previous owner was a real enthusiast and kept up with all the scheduled maintenance religiously. I have a full binder here detailing everything from oil changes to more significant tune-ups. As the ad says, it runs and drives beautifully – a testament to that diligent upkeep!
